title: Post-9/11 United States
symbolicOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with Post-9/11 United States.
symbolicOrderStrengthRationale: Provisional scaffold score based on the case outcome category; requires evidence-chain review before scholarly use.
selectionRationale: Included to test mixed or sequential political-pathology outcomes.
theoryTest: Tests whether cases can move through multiple outcomes over time.
